care.summary: Vibrant trailing plant with purple-and-green striped leaves that thrives in bright indirect light and rewards neglect with rapid growth.
care.light: Bright indirect to moderate; tolerates low light but loses variegation
care.water: Water when top 2-3 cm of soil dries; avoid sitting water
care.soil: Well-draining potting mix with perlite or sand
care.humidity: Average household humidity is fine; appreciates occasional misting
care.fertilizer: Balanced liquid feed monthly during spring and summer
care.toxicity: Mildly toxic if ingested (pets and humans); may cause skin irritation
common_issues: Brown leaf tips from dry air or fluoride in tap water
Leaf drop from cold drafts or temperature swings
tips: Pinch back stems regularly to encourage bushier growth
Propagate easily by placing stem cuttings in water or moist soil
Rotate pot weekly for even growth on all sides
Use rainwater or distilled water to prevent browning
